children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: The Service, in cooperation with the Bureau, shall establish an Indian Child Abuse Treatment Grant Program that provides grants to any Indian tribe or inter­tribal consortium for the establishment on Indian reservations of treatment programs for Indians who have been victims of child abuse or neglect.
Any Indian tribe or intertribal consortium, on its own or in partnership with an urban Indian organization, may submit to the Service an application for a grant under subsection (a).

children.label: A
children.text: shall be in such form as the Service may prescribe;

children.label: B
children.text: shall be submitted to the Service on or before the date designated by the Service; and

children.label: i
children.text: the nature of the program proposed by the applicant,

children.label: ii
children.text: the data and information on which the program is based,

children.label: iii
children.text: the extent to which the program plans to use or incorporate existing services available on the reservation, and

children.label: iv
children.text: the specific treatment concepts to be used under the program.

children.heading: Culturally appropriate treatment
children.label: c Culturally appropriate treatment
children.text: In awarding grants under this section, the Service shall encourage the use of culturally appropriate treatment services and programs that respond to the unique cultural values, customs, and traditions of applicant Indian Tribes.

children.heading: Grant administration and final report
children.label: d Grant administration and final report
A
children.text: evaluate the program for which the grant is made, and

children.label: B
children.text: ensure that the grant funds are expended for the purposes for which the grant was made, and
submit to the Service at the close of the term of the grant a final report which shall include such information as the Service may require.
a description of treatment and services for which grantees have used funds awarded under this section; and
any other information that the Service requires.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: f Authorization of appropriations
children.text: there is hereby authorized to be appropriated to carry out the provisions of this section $10,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1992, 1993, 1994, 1995, 1996, and 1997.1So in original. Probably should be capitalized.1
